description: Maps each DFIR tool on D:/ to its update source for automated or semi-automated update checking.

tools.name: Arsenal Image Mounter
tools.notes: Extract zip and replace folder contents. Rename folder to match new version. Requires .NET runtime.

tools.name: Encrypted Disk Detector
tools.notes: Single EXE from Magnet Forensics. No automated API available; must check download page manually. Version encoded in filename as EDDv310 = 3.1.0.

tools.name: Encrypted Disk Hunter
tools.notes: Standalone EXE. GitHub repo by yourealwaysbe. If repo is unavailable, check https://www.yourealwaysbe.com/ or alternative forks.

tools.name: FTK Imager
tools.notes: Distributed by Exterro (formerly AccessData). Requires form submission to download. No API or direct download link available. Must update manually.

tools.name: KAPE
tools.notes: KAPE binary is distributed by Kroll (requires license/registration). KapeFiles (targets/modules) are on GitHub at EricZimmerman/KapeFiles and can be updated via KAPE's built-in updater. Use 'kape --update' to sync KapeFiles from GitHub. The binary itself requires manual download from Kroll.

tools.name: Magnet RAM Capture
tools.notes: Single EXE from Magnet Forensics. No automated API; check download page manually. Version encoded in filename as v120 = 1.2.0. Tool may be discontinued; verify availability.

tools.name: ExifTool
tools.notes: Windows standalone executable distributed as zip. GitHub repo used for version checking; download the Windows build from exiftool.org. The _64 suffix indicates 64-bit Windows build.

tools.name: HashMyFiles
tools.notes: NirSoft utility. Download the 64-bit version zip from nirsoft.net. No API for version checking; scrape the download page for version info. Direct download: https://www.nirsoft.net/utils/hashmyfiles-x64.zip

tools.name: hashcat
tools.notes: Released as .7z archive on GitHub. Extract and replace folder. Contains binaries, rules, and charsets. Requires OpenCL-compatible GPU drivers.

tools.name: PhotoRec / TestDisk
tools.notes: PhotoRec is bundled with TestDisk by CGSecurity. Download the Windows zip from cgsecurity.org. No GitHub releases; must check the download page. Direct link pattern: https://www.cgsecurity.org/testdisk-<version>.win.zip

tools.name: Timeline Explorer
tools.notes: Part of Eric Zimmerman's tools suite. Download from ericzimmerman.github.io. The site provides a batch downloader script (Get-ZimmermanTools.ps1) that can update all EZ tools at once. Direct zip URL: https://f001.backblazeb2.com/file/EricZimmermanTools/net6/TimelineExplorer.zip

tools.name: NetworkMiner
tools.notes: Free edition available from Netresec. Download as zip and extract. Version in folder name uses hyphens (3-1 = 3.1). Check netresec.com for latest version. Direct download link changes with each release.

tools.name: Nmap
tools.notes: Portable deployment in nMAP folder. Download the portable zip (nmap-<version>-win32.zip) from nmap.org/dist/ and extract. Version auto-checked from nmap.org download page.

tools.name: UniGetUI
tools.notes: Formerly WingetUI. GitHub releases include both installer EXE and portable zip. For portable deployment use the pattern 'UniGetUI.Portable.zip'. UniGetUI can update itself through its own interface. GitHub asset alternatives: UniGetUI.Portable.zip for extract-based install.

ez_tools_updater.description: PowerShell script to update all Eric Zimmerman tools at once (Timeline Explorer, KAPE modules, etc.)

kape_module_updater.description: Update KAPE targets and modules from GitHub
